headerDisplay: Connect this Homebridge instance to your Collar server. Switches are configured server-side under `[[homekit.switches]]` — this plugin discovers them automatically.
footerDisplay: See the Collar repository for setup details.

serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: Base URL of the Collar API (without the trailing /api).

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: Fallback poll cadence. Real-time updates come over SSE; this is a safety net for missed events after a network blip.
